$schema: Describes the legal document templates available in this directory.

templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
templates.description: Mutual non-disclosure agreement that lets two parties exchange confidential information while evaluating a potential business relationship.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement
templates.description: Framework agreement for selling and buying cloud software or SaaS products, covering service access, support, payment, liability, and confidentiality terms.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement
templates.description: Companion agreement to the Cloud Service Agreement that defines uptime targets, support response times, and service credits for a cloud service.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement
templates.description: Governs delivery of professional services and statements of work (SOWs), including deliverables, IP assignment, and payment terms.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement
templates.description: Governs processing of personal data between a controller/processor and a service provider, including GDPR, UK, and Swiss international transfer mechanisms.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Grants an on-premise or installed software license, covering usage rights, updates, open source disclosures, warranties, and liability terms.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Governs co-marketing or business partnerships between two companies, including trademark licensing, obligations, and fee terms.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Short-term trial or evaluation agreement that lets a prospective customer test a product before committing to a full commercial agreement.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement
templates.description: HIPAA-required agreement governing a business associate's use and protection of protected health information (PHI) on behalf of a covered entity.

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Supplements a Product agreement with terms specific to AI/ML features, covering input/output ownership, model training rights, and AI-specific disclaimers.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Grants an early customer access to a pre-release product in exchange for structured feedback and participation in a design partner program.
